_doc: Mocks an upload of a whiteboard photo from the claimant's iPhone. The platform stores the JPEG bytes externally (S3) and writes an EVIDENCE_UPLOADED chain event with this metadata + extracted_content.

extracted_content.document_summary: Whiteboard diagram of the Vantage-7 N12 furnace setup: argon shroud assembly, crucible position, Type-K probe placement (3 probes labelled P1/P2/P3), quench bath geometry. Arrows annotate the gas flow direction and the post-cycle quench transfer path. Hypothesis line at the top: 'B+8% holds at 830 °C / 200 K/s / 60 s'.
extracted_content.ocr_text:
VANT-7 N12 SETUP
ARGON SHROUD
  P1   P2   P3  (Type-K)
CRUCIBLE @ 830 °C
QUENCH 200 K/s
HYP: B+8% holds at 830 °C / 200 K/s / 60 s
N10 CRACK @ 1.6 mm FILLET
N12 → INTACT?
NEXT: XRD AT TEMP

activities.title: Vantage-7 phase-stability program
activities.rationale: Contemporaneous setup diagram for a furnace cycle that produced the N12 result; documents the hypothesis line before the run.
